summary: Integrated ADR 0314 onto the latest realistic exact-main tree by replaying the resumable runbook task surface, deep-link return-to-task entry, and supporting Keycloak, API gateway, docker-runtime, and ops-portal fixes from base d44bdbfc6166f385fbc452209d38e4cd2880c276 until the merged repository truth reached repo version 0.178.5 and platform version 0.130.99 with governed exact-main validation and live evidence preserved.

verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-keycloak-live-apply-r4.txt` captures the exact-main Keycloak replay after the admin-client and Open WebUI drift repairs, proving the merged tree converged successfully on the production control plane.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-api-gateway-live-apply-r11.txt` captures the successful exact-main API gateway replay after the runtime-control Docker bridge-chain recovery and packaged runtime tree fixes.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-ops-portal-live-apply-r18.txt` captures the governed exact-main replay of the interactive ops portal with the resumable task summaries and return-to-task entry enabled.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-task-reentry-portal-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-task-reentry-resume-r2.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-task-reentry-portal-after-resume-r2.txt` prove the repo-managed `validation-gate-task-review` flow can be resumed through the live portal without losing human task context.

`receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-targeted-validation-pytest-r4.txt` records `258 passed in 48.54s`, while `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-validate-repo-r6.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0314-mainline-generated-checks-r2.txt` preserve the final repo automation, generated-surface, and receipt validation pass on the merged exact-main tree.

notes: This structured mainline receipt is the canonical live-apply record for ADR 0314 and is used by the stack metadata for api_gateway, keycloak, ops_portal, and the runbook task reentry capability.
The exact-main replays required the Docker bridge-chain recovery on runtime-control-lv3 before the API gateway and portal services could be re-applied successfully from the merged tree.
Platform version 0.130.99 is the first verified platform state where the merged ADR 0314 operator experience, supporting runtime fixes, and exact-main service replays are all true together.
